SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.external.worldbank.indicators.impl

Package com.hack23.cia.model.external.worldbank.indicators.impl

package com.hack23.cia.model.external.worldbank.indicators.impl
This package contains implementations for handling indicator data from the World Bank. Key classes: - IndicatorElement: Represents an indicator element. - IndicatorsElement: Represents a collection of indicator elements. - Source: Represents the source of an indicator. - SourceName: Enum representing different source names. - Topic: Represents a topic related to an indicator. - Topics: Represents a collection of topics. - ObjectFactory: Factory class for creating instances of the model classes. Annotations: - @XmlSchema: Defines the XML namespace and element form default for the package.
